description: Single Gabor patch stimulus exemplar: a circular patch with sinusoidal luminance grating modulated by a 2-D Gaussian envelope, presented against a uniform mid-grey background.
must_preserve: segment exactly one isolated Gabor patch
circular shape with soft Gaussian-blurred edge
sinusoidal grating pattern visible inside the patch
do not include fixation cross or surrounding background elements
allowed_variation: orientation of grating varies by condition (0–179°)
spatial frequency may differ across experiments
absolute pixel size may be rescaled for different displays

prompt_text: Spatial layout of multiple Gabor patches arranged around a central fixation point; each item has a different orientation, illustrating a multi-item working memory display. description: Spatial layout of multiple Gabor patches arranged around a central fixation point; each item has a different orientation, illustrating a multi-item working memory display.
must_preserve: segment the group of Gabor patches as a whole layout
preserve relative spatial positions of items around fixation
do not segment individual items separately in this record
do not include data charts, line plots, bar graphs, or axis labels
allowed_variation: number of items varies by set-size condition
individual orientations are randomised per trial

prompt_text: Black teardrop-shaped stimulus with a rounded bulbous end and a pointed tip end. Must preserve: teardrop silhouette geometry; solid black fill.
description: Black teardrop-shaped stimulus with a rounded bulbous end and a pointed tip end.
